Rythmos® Pull Cord

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Manual alerts
Emergency events
Bath/Spa safe

Overview

Rythmos® Pull Cord is Battery-powered nurse call device that enables residents to initiate alerts by pull cord or lever, providing immediate caregiver notification.

FUNCTIONS

Triggers alert events via pull cord or lever
Sends alerts through Rythmos® mesh network to caregivers
Provides LED confirmation that alert was sent

Key Capabilities

Nurse
Call

Instant
caregiver alert on pull

LED
Indicator

Visual
confirmation alert sent

Water
Resistant

Safe
for baths, showers & spas

Battery
Life Reporting

Low
battery indication

Resident
Check-In

Resident
check-in capabilities

Easy
Install

No
tools or special wiring needed

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 110 × 70 × 45 mm
Power Source: 2 × AA batteries
Battery Life: Up to 5 years
Mesh Network Protocol: Rythmos® Mesh Network · Wirepas 2.4 GHz
Alert Indicator: LED visual indicator
Water Resistance: Bath & spa safe
Installation: Surface mount · Tape · Single gang box
Firmware Updates: OTA (over-the-air)
Management: Care Manager (web + mobile)

System Topology — Pull Cord Deployment

Pull cords should be installed in bathrooms, toilets, and other high-risk areas where immediate assistance may be required. Devices must be positioned within easy reach from both seated and floor levels to ensure accessibility in case of a fall. Placement near beds in resident rooms is also recommended. Installations should avoid obstructions and be validated during setup to ensure alerts are reliably delivered to staff.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Install in bathrooms, bedrooms
- Suitable for high-moisture areas

Reachability

- Accessible from seated or floor
- Always within emergency reach

Mounting

- Surface mount (wall or fixture)
- Tape or single gang box

Environment

- Wet-area approved
- Suitable for high-risk fall areas

Power

- Battery powered (no wiring)
- 2 × AA batteries included

Maintenance

- No reconfig. replacement
- Low battery indication
